title: Ukraine set to get its own 'Starlink' satellite constellation with SpaceX starting in 2027 as $1bn project powers on despite CEO death
summary: With a target of 360 satellites, those per-unit costs alone would account for roughly $720 million to over $1 billion of the total budget Stetman also plans a joint satellite manufacturing facility inside Ukraine alongside GomSpace, expected to fully open next year…
